## Summary

Describe the release asset issue clearly.

## Affected Asset

Select all that apply:

- [ ] HDEX Q1 ZIP package
- [ ] FINAL_HASHES file
- [ ] GitHub Release description
- [ ] File name
- [ ] Download link
- [ ] Asset checksum
- [ ] Other

## Release Version

Example:

```text
HDEX Q1 v0.1.0

What Looks Wrong
Explain the mismatch, missing file, unclear name, broken download, or incorrect metadata.

Expected Correction
Describe what the release asset or metadata should show.

Safety Confirmation
 I downloaded assets only from the official HDEX Q1 GitHub Release page.
